/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/CasinoSimulator.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/CasinoSimulator.dir/src/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CasinoSimulator.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CasinoSimulator.dir/src/shader_utils.cpp.o -o CasinoSimulator  /usr/lib64/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.56 libglad.a /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so
